title: Harry Leary BIOLAB / Peak Performance ROC 1 Jersey
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A red and orange BIOLAB / Peak Performance jersey marked “LEARY,” “ROC,” “NAG” and number 1. It joins championship status with later team and sponsor identity.
provenance_summary: From the Leary Locker, as documented in the Digital Jersey Wall record.
qualifications: The rider, number and sponsor markings are visible in the supplied image.
The Google Sites source misspelled “Performance” as “PERFORMNCE.” The public title is normalized while the original wording is documented.
